name: Volato Group, Inc.
summary: Overview Volato is an aviation technology company that connects travelers to private, on-demand flight access and develops proprietary software platforms for enterprise and operational applications. Historically, we generated revenue through our aircraft ownership program, a focused commercial strategy that included deposit products, charter flights, and aircraft management services.
